name: Mineva [POV Getting Kidnapped and Confined]
description:
“You’ll never get away with thi-mmph!!!”

Listen up, sucker. Your villainous, bondage obsessed kidnapper wants to keep you all to herself for a little while. Yippee.

Scenario is you end up walking into a robbery scene, that just feels a little off. Why you're there? I dunno, maybe you're investigating, your friend invited you here, or maybe you just thought you could get a chunk the expensive stuff lining the shelves. Point is, your ass got distracted for one second and thats all it took for this notorious lady to get her hands on you.

HEAVY Bondage/kidnapping focus. So, if you wanna get kidnapped, 1. get some help (same) and 2. hey check this freaky aa lady out. This is for the folks into a good long term confinement, its kinda inspired by a story I read forever ago, but I wont babble about that here.

  • User POV was originally written as her nemesis or whatever, but i mixed it up so it can be a little more anypov but i mighta missed a spot idc, so go buckwild. That being said, I personally enjoy this bot most with an amateur detective OC.

    I wrote a handy bit of extra background for her that you certainly have to dig to find, but you know - shes got a life outside this whole brilliant thief and kidnapper thing, so that might be fun to explore if you're into that.

  • Oh and uhh... the art: I drew it, but this girl's design is just straight up one of @MirYumiya 's girls. I just loved it too much, figured actually sitting down and drawing it myself might be more respectful than just yoinking it and putting it here - but if they want it gone just say the word and I'll come up with somethin' else.

and am I supposed to tag this? how? look, theres gonna be hogties, gags, duct tape, LOTS of bondage, most definitely kidnapping, confinement, uhhh shes got a cat? Lots of BDSM noncon stuff, shes not super crazy or anything but she might get all handsy. Definitely Submissive POV but I haven't tried to beat her up or nothin, so maybe that'll work. You tell me.
creator: neverlia
